problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: The key to What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale? is Liquid crystal elastomer actuation — specifically Liquid crystal elastomer — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
